title: MT❯Corporate
content:
### Streamlined. Centralized. Simplified.
As a solution provided by McCarthy Tétrault, MT❯Corporate offers cost-effective services for your corporate compliance obligations. Powered by a dedicated team of highly-trained specialists from across the country, and enabled by technology, MT❯Corporate manages day-to-day compliance matters for companies throughout Canada, including:
- Annual maintenance via digital minute books
- Extra-provincial registrations, annual reports and updates
- Significant control registers and filings
- Incorporations and organizations
- Changes (name, address, directors/officers)
Our dedicated team anticipates your needs, takes care of the details, and keeps all your information in one place and fully accessible. We provide a cost-effective solution with the white glove service McCarthy Tétrault is known for.
- Enabling you to focus on what matters: Let us take care of day-to-day responsibilities of corporate compliance so you can direct your efforts towards value-added activities and growing the business.
- Driving efficiency: Minimize the burden and confusion of corporate obligations by combining streamlined processes and effective technologies designed to anticipate, simplify and systematize monthly, quarterly and annual responsibilities.
- Achieving cost predictability and savings: With competitive fee arrangements, you can ensure there are no surprises in your legal budget with experts who identify issues before they become problems.
- Naomi Youngson President, MT❯Corporate Vancouver +1 604-643-7135 nyoungson@mtcorporate.ca
President, MT❯Corporate
nyoungson@mtcorporate.ca
